programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Joe's team must overcome internal differences and start building the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon and Cameron struggle to make Joe's vision a reality; Joe and Bosworth seek the funds to make the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron nearly completes the BIOS; when a crisis threatens the project's future, the entire team is needed to save it.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron chafes under new management; Joe and Gordon try to obtain an important piece of technology.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: After having a breakthrough, Cameron is at odds with Gordon; Joe must make a difficult decision; personal revelations are induced.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: When a person from Joe's past visits, his connection with Cameron is threatened; the cost Gordon's work catches up to him.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Roger changes his approach to make new business; Pete has an awkward run-in with a client; Abe works on renovations for Peggy's new apartment.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: SCDP tries to pacify competing clients; An unexpected guest blind-sides Pete; Roger announces new business with Fleischmann's margarine.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: A surprise visitor disrupts Don; Peggy seeks inspiration; The creatives work on new ideas for a client; Don gets and energy shot.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Roger is tormented by a recurring dream; Joan goes to the beach; Don and Ted argue over whose strategy works for margarine.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: The agency works to keep a client; Joan is caught off-guard; Joan and Peggy approach Ted about a new client; Don and Roger leave for Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Betty makes plans for Sally's future; Peggy faces trouble at home; Don and Roger discuss strategy for a big client.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: The partners cannot agree on a new campaign; Don takes a day off; Ken goes hunting with a client; Megan speculates.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Neurosurgeon Rowan Fielding has a problem -- when she gets mad, she kills with her mind; her search for answers sends her toward her secretive biological family; in New Orleans, Deirdre Mayfair is desperate to escape from her aunt's oppressive house.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Wracked with grief over Ellie's death, Rowan is out of control and unfit to perform surgeries; her paranoia that someone is following her is proven true; in New Orleans, Deirdre and her mysterious companion Lasher work together to draw Rowan home.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Deirdre's grisly death, Rowan searches for safety in a strange city; Sip provides Rowan with a safe house while he investigates Deirdre's murder; Lasher makes contact with Rowan, but not in the way one might expect.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: At Deirdre's funeral, Rowan is plunged into the world of the infamous Mayfair family; Uncle Cortland and Aunt Carlotta present diverging views on Lasher; Rowan must choose whom to trust and face the dire consequences; Sip identifies Deirdre's killer.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Trapped in the First Street House, Rowan and Sip must confront its many mysteries in order to escape; Rowan grapples with an inconceivable offer; Sip's sister Odette makes a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Desperate to relinquish Lasher, Rowan reaches out to her extended Mayfair family for help; Rowan must trust their unique process, a sacred ritual; Sip's search for answers takes him back to the Talamasca.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan makes a shocking discovery but has to deal with it alone; a tragic event brings Rowan closer to the Mayfairs -- and Lasher; Sip falls deeper down the rabbit hole of the key necklace.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan inadvertently discovers her role in a prophecy that's held the Mayfair family for generations; Sip's investigation reaches its conclusion, uncovering secrets that could tarnish both Rowan's family and his role in the Talamasca.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: Louis de Pointe du Lac lives in 1910 New Orleans as executor-in-charge of his family's fortune; when he meets the vampire Lestat, Louis' life begins to unravel in otherworldly ways; in 2020, Louis tells his story to journalist Daniel Molloy.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.sub-title: ...After the Phantoms of Your Former Self
programme.desc: Beginning his life as a vampire, Louis learns the rules of vampirism from his maker and companion Lestat; Louis discovers increasing differences between himself and Lestat; in Dubai, Louis reveals more of his modern-day vampire lifestyle to Molloy.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.sub-title: Is My Very Nature That of the Devil
programme.desc: Louis continues his life as a businessman of Storyville; when an old friend comes to town, Louis' relationship with Lestat is tested; Louis' business intertwines with growing tensions in New Orleans, leading to a new chapter in Louis' vampire life.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.sub-title: ...The Ruthless Pursuit of Blood With All a Child's Demanding
programme.desc: Claudia's transformation into a vampire teen completely changes Louis and Lestat's lives; as Claudia asks more questions, Louis and Lestat are forced to confront questions about making a teen vampire; Claudia learns dark realities of her new life.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.sub-title: A Vile Hunger for Your Hammering Heart
programme.desc: Claudia's activities and curiosities present continued challenges for Louis and Lestat; her actions light an explosive fuse.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.sub-title: Like Angels Put in Hell by God
programme.desc: Lestat attempts to make amends with Louis; the vampire family decides to live together once more; a surprising action from Lestat leads the family to decide to leave New Orleans, once and for all; in Dubai, Molloy has a shocking realization.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: The vampire family plans to leave town after a big Mardi Gras ball; Claudia and Louis operate outside of Lestat's knowledge; in Dubai, Louis reveals a new element to the interview that changes everything.
